title: thymus campestris
intro: Thymus campestris, also known as field thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antifungal, and antibacterial properties, which help to heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. The medicinal properties of Thymus campestris also provide health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Thymus campestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
